positive: A vintage, distressed screen-print style illustration of a stylized astronaut floating amongst constellations and retro planets. The artwork should mimic the look of a 1950s sci-fi poster, using limited colors (mustard yellow, burnt orange, navy blue). Bold lines, silkscreen texture, retro-futurism.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
